title: Beef Stew with a Ukrainian Twist
description: A hearty beef stew with a mild and aromatic flavor profile inspired by Ukrainian cuisine, featuring tender beef and a blend of spices.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the beef and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Remove the beef from the pot and set aside.
Add the onion to the pot and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the carrot and potato to the pot and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Add the beef broth, red wine, paprika, salt, and pepper to the pot.
Return the beef to the pot and bring to a boil.
Cover the pot and transfer to the oven.
Bake for 2.5 hours, or until the beef is tender.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped parsley.
